web.title: Architecture overview
web.description: The official Sentry MCP server runs on the Sentry platform, and uses the Streamable HTTP transport. This is commonly referred to as a “remote” MCP server.

web.title: Understanding Authorization in MCP
web.description: Learn how to implement secure authorization for MCP servers using OAuth 2.1 to protect sensitive resources and operations.

web.description: In-depth guide to using the MCP Inspector for testing and debugging Model Context Protocol servers.

web.description: This guide demonstrates how to connect to remote MCP servers using Claude as an example, one of the many clients that support MCP.
